programs.title: RSPCA Animal Rescue
programs.desc: A cat saved by the RSPCA is reunited with its owners after being missing for two years and a Labrador puppy is rescued just in the nick of time.

programs.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programs.desc: Joh and Graham check out a sustainable low-budget family home, surrounded by a lush garden. Adam shows you how to fix two common kitchen issues. Ed makes salmon gado gado.

programs.title: Escape To The Country
programs.desc: Looking to put their family first, Ginny Buckley takes a couple from Harrogate on a property search in Gloucestershire with a budget of 650,000 pounds.

programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Join Christina Trevanion for this edition of Bargain Hunt from Wales. Experts Philip Serrell and Kate Bliss guide their teams as they pick three items to take to auction in Cardiff. Christina has a music lesson in one of Pembrokeshire's finest stately homes, Picton Castle.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: The County Sheepdog Trials take place at Ashfordly Hall, and it soon becomes clear that even such a prestigious event can bring out the worst in some people. Meanwhile, Vernon tries to cash in by organising the toilet facilities for the event - but his money-making dreams soon go down the pan.

programs.title: McDonald And Dodds
programs.desc: The detectives investigate when the body of a successful Bath businessman is found in a shallow grave in the shadow of Glastonbury Tor on the dawn of All Soul's Day. Their first suspect is local artist Hector Ingham, although McDonald can't help but be suspicious of the man who found the body. As increasingly cryptic clues come to light, one name keeps reoccurring in paper trails, credit card statement and on the lips of witnesses - that of Dodds himself.
